tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search for contacts. Use query for simple free-text search, and filters for precise property-based filtering. Returns a compact list of matching contacts.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get a contact by ID. Use properties to request specific fields, and associations to include linked object IDs (e.g. companies, deals, tickets).

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a contact. Provide common fields (firstname/lastname/email) and/or a properties map for other HubSpot contact properties.

tools.name: update_contact
tools.description: Update a contact by ID. Provide any fields to update as common fields and/or in the properties map. Fields not provided are unchanged.

tools.name: archive_contact
tools.description: Archive (delete) a contact by ID. This moves the record to the recycle bin.

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search for companies. Use query for free-text search and filters for property-based filtering. Returns a compact list of matching companies.

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Get a company by ID. Use properties to request specific fields, and associations to include linked object IDs (e.g. contacts, deals, tickets).

tools.name: create_company
tools.description: Create a company. Provide name/domain and/or a properties map for other HubSpot company properties.

tools.name: update_company
tools.description: Update a company by ID. Provide any fields to update as common fields and/or in the properties map. Fields not provided are unchanged.

tools.name: archive_company
tools.description: Archive (delete) a company by ID. This moves the record to the recycle bin.

tools.name: list_owners
tools.description: List CRM owners (users) available in the HubSpot account. Useful for assigning owners to records via hubspot_owner_id.

tools.name: list_properties
tools.description: List properties for an object type (e.g. contacts, companies, deals, tickets). Use this to discover valid property names for filtering and updates.

tools.name: list_pipelines
tools.description: List pipelines and stages for an object type (commonly deals or tickets). Use this to find valid pipeline and stage IDs before creating/updating records.

tools.name: get_associations
tools.description: Get associations from a CRM record to another object type. Returns the associated record IDs (paginated).

tools.name: create_association
tools.description: Create a default (unlabeled) association between two CRM records. Example: associate a contact with a company or a deal with a contact.

tools.name: remove_association
tools.description: Remove an association between two CRM records. This uses HubSpot's association batch archive endpoint under the hood.

tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search for deals. Use query for free-text search and filters for property-based filtering (e.g. pipeline, dealstage, amount).

tools.name: get_deal
tools.description: Get a deal by ID. Use properties to request specific fields, and associations to include linked object IDs.

tools.name: create_deal
tools.description: Create a deal. Provide dealname/amount/pipeline/dealstage and/or a properties map for other HubSpot deal properties.

tools.name: update_deal
tools.description: Update a deal by ID. Common updates include moving stages via dealstage. Fields not provided are unchanged.

tools.name: archive_deal
tools.description: Archive (delete) a deal by ID. This moves the record to the recycle bin.

tools.name: search_tickets
tools.description: Search for tickets. Use query for free-text search and filters for property-based filtering (e.g. hs_pipeline, hs_pipeline_stage, priority).

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Get a ticket by ID. Use properties to request specific fields, and associations to include linked object IDs.

tools.name: create_ticket
tools.description: Create a ticket. Provide subject/content/pipeline/stage and/or a properties map for other HubSpot ticket properties.

tools.name: update_ticket
tools.description: Update a ticket by ID. Common updates include changing hs_pipeline_stage. Fields not provided are unchanged.

tools.name: archive_ticket
tools.description: Archive (delete) a ticket by ID. This moves the record to the recycle bin.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Search notes. Use query for free-text search and filters for precise property-based filtering.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a note and (optionally) associate it to one or more CRM records (contacts, companies, deals, tickets). Provide body text; the handler sets hs_note_body and hs_timestamp automatically unless overridden.

tools.name: search_tasks
tools.description: Search tasks. Use query for free-text search and filters for precise property-based filtering.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a task and (optionally) associate it to one or more CRM records. Provide subject/body/status/priority and a due timestamp; the handler maps these to HubSpot task properties.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update a task by ID. Common updates include setting hs_task_status to COMPLETED.
